## What & why


## Checklist
- [ ] One concern per PR
- [ ] Resource entries carry `[level][effort][domain][free/paid]` tags + a one-line "why"
- [ ] Model/cost facts include source URL and `verified: YYYY-MM-DD`
- [ ] Template additions declare upstream origin + license (MIT-derived stays MIT; original = GPLv3) in this PR AND the folder README
- [ ] Plain language (many readers use English as a second language)
